# Geco — Full Reference

> Geco is a building materials brand specializing in tile adhesives, grouts, sealants, and tapes. Inspired by the gecko — nature's perfect adhesion engineer — Geco products are engineered for superior bonding, reliability, and performance. Geco is part of the VNC family of brands, founded in 1983.

Website: https://geco.build
Tagline: Inspired By Nature. Engineered To Hold.
Parent company: VNC Group (est. 1983)
Toll-free: 1800 599 3939
Email: contactus@vncgroup.com
Headquarters: Karur, Tamil Nadu, India

---

## About Geco

Geco draws its inspiration from the gecko, a small creature weighing just 70 grams yet capable of supporting 133 kilograms, adhering to any surface through millions of microscopic setae. This natural adhesion system is the philosophy behind every Geco product: unwavering grip, adaptability, and reliable performance across every surface and project.

Whether you are a professional contractor or a DIY enthusiast, Geco products deliver superior performance through intelligent design — tile adhesives and grouts, sealants and tapes — each engineered to hold when it matters.

Geco is part of the VNC family of brands. Founded in 1983, VNC's brands are now market leaders in many product categories. Apart from tile and stone fixing solutions, VNC operates with leading brands and products in multiple categories: welding consumables, steel wires, fencing solutions, paints, coatings, and waterproofing solutions.

### Office Locations

**Registered Office:**
VNC Electrodes, 3, Industrial Estate, S.Vellalapatti, Karur - 639004, Tamil Nadu, India

**Chennai Office:**
VNC Electrodes, 11/4, Janaki Avenue, MRC Nagar, Raja Annamalai Puram, Chennai - 600028, Tamil Nadu, India

---

## Product Categories

### Tile Adhesives
High-performance adhesives for fixing ceramic, vitrified, and large-format tiles on walls and floors. Geco tile adhesives are engineered for strong, reliable bonds that last.
Browse: https://geco.build/products/category/tile-adhesives

### Tile Grouts
Cementitious and epoxy-based grouts for filling joints with stain resistance, flexibility, and colour retention. Available in multiple formulations for different joint widths and environments.
Browse: https://geco.build/products/category/tile-grouts

### Sealants
Universal silicone sealants for sealing joints in bathrooms, kitchens, and wet areas. Flexible, waterproof, and mould-resistant for long-lasting protection.
Browse: https://geco.build/products/category/sealants

### Tapes
Masking tapes for clean paint lines and surface protection during application. Designed for easy removal without residue.
Browse: https://geco.build/products/category/tapes

---

## Products

### Geco Tilebond
High-performance tile adhesive for fixing ceramic and vitrified tiles on walls and floors. Provides strong, durable bonds suitable for both interior and exterior applications.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-tilebond
Category: Tile Adhesives

### Geco Tilebond Plus
Premium tile adhesive with enhanced bonding strength for large-format and heavy tiles. Ideal for demanding installations where extra holding power is required.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-tilebond-plus
Category: Tile Adhesives

### Geco Tilebond Classic
Reliable tile adhesive for standard ceramic tile installations on interior surfaces. A cost-effective solution for everyday tiling projects.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-tilebond-classic
Category: Tile Adhesives

### Geco Jointfill Epoxy
Epoxy-based tile grout offering superior stain resistance and durability for joints. Ideal for areas requiring chemical resistance and easy cleaning, such as kitchens and commercial spaces.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-jointfill-epoxy
Category: Tile Grouts

### Geco Jointfill
Cementitious tile grout for filling joints in ceramic and vitrified tile installations. Provides a smooth, consistent finish with good water resistance.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-jointfill
Category: Tile Grouts

### Geco Durafill 12
High-strength grout for joints up to 12mm wide with excellent water resistance. Suitable for both wall and floor tile joints in interior and exterior applications.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-durafill-12
Category: Tile Grouts

### Geco Durafill Max
Maximum-performance grout for wide joints with superior flexibility and colour retention. Engineered for heavy-duty use in commercial and residential settings.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-durafill-max
Category: Tile Grouts

### Geco Masking Tape
General-purpose masking tape for clean paint lines and surface protection. Removes cleanly without residue, suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-masking-tape
Category: Tapes

### Geco Uniseal
Universal silicone sealant for sealing joints in bathrooms, kitchens, and wet areas. Offers excellent adhesion, flexibility, and waterproofing on multiple surfaces.
URL: https://geco.build/products/geco-uniseal
Category: Sealants

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Geco?**
Geco is a building materials brand that manufactures tile adhesives, grouts, sealants, and tapes. The brand is part of VNC Group, founded in 1983 in Tamil Nadu, India.

**What does the name "Geco" mean?**
Geco is inspired by the gecko — a small lizard capable of adhering to any surface through millions of microscopic setae. This natural adhesion system is the philosophy behind every Geco product.

**What products does Geco offer?**
Geco offers tile adhesives (Tilebond, Tilebond Plus, Tilebond Classic), tile grouts (Jointfill, Jointfill Epoxy, Durafill 12, Durafill Max), sealants (Uniseal), and tapes (Masking Tape).

**Where is Geco available?**
Geco products are manufactured and sold in India, with offices in Karur and Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

**How can I contact Geco?**
Call toll-free at 1800 599 3939, email contactus@vncgroup.com, or visit https://geco.build/contact-us.
